title: Here’s what happened in crypto today
summary: Here’s what happened in crypto today
briefing: Need to know what happened in crypto today? Here is the latest news on daily trends and events impacting Bitcoin price, blockchain, DeFi, Web3 and crypto regulation.

title: Dutch court declares crypto platform Knaken bankrupt over missing funds
summary: Dutch court declares crypto platform Knaken bankrupt over missing funds
briefing: The Rotterdam court said bankruptcy was necessary to ensure an orderly settlement because the company lacked enough assets to fully repay users.

title: Stablecoin growth will erode bank deposits, says ECB’s Cipollone
summary: Stablecoin growth will erode bank deposits, says ECB’s Cipollone
briefing: ECB’s Piero Cipollone said stablecoin adoption could erode bank deposits, but the digital euro will keep banks at the center of payments.

title: UK sentences 2 hackers tied to $115M crypto ransom scheme
summary: UK sentences 2 hackers tied to $115M crypto ransom scheme
briefing: The pair pleaded guilty after investigators linked them to the Scattered Spider cybercrime group, which US prosecutors say extorted dozens of companies.

title: ESMA adds 14 new CASPs to MiCA register as licensing slows
summary: ESMA adds 14 new CASPs to MiCA register as licensing slows
briefing: ESMA adds 14 CASPs to its MiCA register, with banks and Ripple Payments Europe among the new entries as total providers reach 294.

title: Bitcoin bottom countdown nears 50 days after BTC supply in loss passed 50%
summary: Bitcoin bottom countdown nears 50 days after BTC supply in loss passed 50%
briefing: Bitcoin supply in loss hit 50% nearly 50 days ago, mimicking the countdown to BTC price bear-market bottoms.

title: US indicts crypto investor over alleged $20M fraud scheme
summary: US indicts crypto investor over alleged $20M fraud scheme
briefing: Federal prosecutors allege the South Dakota investor used false promises to raise money, repaid earlier investors with new funds and laundered proceeds through crypto exchanges.

title: MacOS malware hijacks Telegram sessions, targets crypto wallets: SlowMist
summary: MacOS malware hijacks Telegram sessions, targets crypto wallets: SlowMist
briefing: A macOS malware steals credentials to hijack Telegram sessions, decrypt cryptocurrency wallets or trick users into entering their wallet recovery phrases through fake applications.

title: Morning Minute: Citadel Securities Invests $400M in Crypto.com
summary: Morning Minute: Citadel Securities Invests $400M in Crypto.com
briefing: Wall Street and crypto's convergence snapped into focus, while crypto majors gave back most of the week's gains as broader markets sold off.

title: Bitcoin Tests $63K as Long-Term Holders Keep Selling at a Loss
summary: Bitcoin Tests $63K as Long-Term Holders Keep Selling at a Loss
briefing: Some two-thirds of the coins moving onto exchanges are long-term holders taking losses, as a macro risk-off drags on Bitcoin’s price.

title: Crypto.com Hits $20B Valuation After $400M Citadel Securities Investment
summary: Crypto.com Hits $20B Valuation After $400M Citadel Securities Investment
briefing: The market maker's stake marks Crypto.com's first institutional funding round, as Wall Street deepens its push into crypto.

title: Leaks Reveal Suno Fed Thousands of Hours of Deezer, YouTube and Pond5 Data Into Its AI
summary: Leaks Reveal Suno Fed Thousands of Hours of Deezer, YouTube and Pond5 Data Into Its AI
briefing: Source code leaked reveals how substantial portions of Suno’s training library were assembled.

title: Morgan Stanley Launches Bitcoin, Ethereum, and Solana Trading on E*Trade
summary: Morgan Stanley Launches Bitcoin, Ethereum, and Solana Trading on E*Trade
briefing: Eligible customers can now buy, sell, and hold Bitcoin, Ethereum, and Solana with Morgan Stanley via Zero Hash.

title: Bitcoin Q-Day Recovery Proposal Aims to Let Users Prove Ownership After Quantum Attack
summary: Bitcoin Q-Day Recovery Proposal Aims to Let Users Prove Ownership After Quantum Attack
briefing: Project Eleven says a new post-quantum cryptographic proof could help Bitcoin users recover wallets after Q-Day by verifying ownership.

title: Mira Murati Drops Her First AI Model After Leaving OpenAI—And It's Fully Open Source
summary: Mira Murati Drops Her First AI Model After Leaving OpenAI—And It's Fully Open Source
briefing: Mira Murati's Inkling won't dethrone the best Chinese open-weights models, but it gives Western developers something they haven't yet had.

title: Visa Unveils Stablecoin Platform for Banks and Fintech Companies
summary: Visa Unveils Stablecoin Platform for Banks and Fintech Companies
briefing: The Visa Stablecoin Platform will let financial institutions integrate stablecoin payments and treasury operations into Visa's existing network.
